title: hydrocotyle bowlesioides
intro: Hydrocotyle bowlesioides, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant species native to India and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle bowlesioides include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting eye health. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
